itinerary.route: Maligne Lake TH to Little Shovel Pass
itinerary.mapNote: Leave Maligne Lake behind, climb through subalpine to first high camp. 2150m.

itinerary.route: Little Shovel to Shovel Pass Camp
itinerary.mapNote: The famous ridge traverse. Panoramic views of Jasper's high country. 2350m.

itinerary.route: Shovel Pass to Signal Mountain TH
itinerary.mapNote: Descend from alpine to valley through old-growth forest. 1670m.

waypoints.name: Shovel Pass
waypoints.note: Highest point of the trail. Classic Jasper viewpoint. 2560m.

waypoints.name: Little Shovel Pass
waypoints.note: First high point. Gateway to the main ridge walk.

waypoints.name: Maligne Lake
waypoints.note: Iconic Canadian Rockies lake. Trail start. Most photographed in Jasper.

waypoints.name: Curator Lake
waypoints.note: Remote alpine lake below Shovel Pass. Perfect reflection pool.
